idea-plugin.name: Kokedera Icons - Japanese Moss Temple Icons
idea-plugin.description:
Kokedera Icons

128 file & folder icons inspired by the moss-covered temple garden Saihō-ji (苔寺) in Kyoto. Flat, organic shapes drawn from moss, stone, and lantern light.

Features

  • 93 unique file icons covering 290+ file types
  • 22 folder icon pairs with open/closed states
  • Designed to pair with the Kokedera color theme
  • Colors drawn from moss greens, lantern amber, cedar teal, and stone gray

Pair with the theme

For the full experience, install both:

  • Kokedera Theme — the color theme
  • Kokedera Icons — this icon pack
